title: CORE planning document header (ADR-105 D5)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter header of a planning document under .specs/planning/ (CORE-*.md pattern — handoffs are governed by handoff.schema.json). Authored per ADR-105 D5 as the minimum-viable schema for the 'planning' document kind. The prose body is unconstrained; this schema governs only the structured header block. No per-class status subset enum exists yet (ADR-105 D8 deferral); this schema uses the full document_status superset.

supersedes.description: Id of planning document this supersedes, or null.
